module.capture_pals.log.position_correct: Position correction before exit in fixed mode: A(0.33s) -> Wait(0.2s) -> S(0.033s)
module.capture_pals.description:
### Tips
* Implemented based on capture strategies from videos BV1SV8wzjEpE and BV1SV8wzjEpE
* Requires high-damage max-level pals with Thunder Summon + Ice Break / Defense setups (e.g. Armored, Explosive Member) for instant kills
* Before capturing pals, ensure the Frenzy Support Skill hotkey is set to C in game settings
* Before starting, ensure the game is in fullscreen 16:9 and currently on the Partner Island / Adventure Island selection screen
* Fixed-Point mode: after entering the map, press the Frenzy skill (C) and then attempt capture with F; repeats at the configured interval
* Patrol mode: after each capture the script exits the map with ESC and re-enters to refresh patrol pals
* Sync mode: enable both islands to alternate between them based on each cycle; once one island finishes it will continue with the other
